data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplified navigation and recommendations reduce decision time for users.
data.technical_spec: UI maintains consistent design with intuitive iconography and easy access menus.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Interactive elements sized proportionally and located strategically to improve accessibility.

data.title: Gestalt Principles
data.description: Intuitive design patterns using principles like proximity and similarity.
data.technical_spec: Visual hierarchy adheres to content grouping and emphasis on critical actions.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Familiar user patterns based on widespread web standards improve user experience.
data.technical_spec: Adheres to platform conventions and user expectations to reduce learning curve.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Content segmentation into manageable chunks enhances understanding and retention.
data.technical_spec: Uses playlists, chapters, and sections to organize content effectively.
